cases.title: Testing-plan GPS validation row covers FR-35 radius, accuracy, and permission-denied outcomes
preconditions: Testing-plan §3.1 GPS validation coverage block applies (FR-34, FR-35, BR-08/09/10, AC-09, AC-10).
gps-required-session fixture: Open class session with effective policy gpsRequired=true, gpsRadiusMeters=100, room latitude/longitude configured, and accuracy threshold set.
Authenticated enrolled students exist with no prior successful attendance for the session.
steps: Resolve effective attendance policy and confirm gpsRequired=true with gpsRadiusMeters=100 and room anchor coordinates.
Submit check-in with GPS coordinates within radius and acceptable accuracy; record outcome.
Submit check-in with GPS coordinates outside radius; record outcome and validation metadata.
Submit check-in with accuracyMeters worse than configured threshold; record outcome.
Submit check-in with gps payload indicating permission denied; record outcome.
cases.expected: Scenario-matrix maps FR-35 to testing-plan GPS validation row: within-radius passes GPS guard; out-of-radius yields OutOfRadius or Suspicious per policy; low accuracy yields LowAccuracy or Suspicious per BR-10; permission denied yields GpsDisabled per BR-08; all paths log structured validation metadata on CheckInAttempt.

cases.title: M04 GPS validator accepts within-radius coordinates and persists gps_validation_result on success
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for M04 check-in and M02 getRoomLocation boundary.
Open gps-required session with room at (10.762622, 106.660172), gpsRadiusMeters=100; enrolled student has no AttendanceRecord.
GPS coordinates supplied are approximately 25 m from room anchor with accuracyMeters=20.
steps: Capture beforeState: zero Present/Late AttendanceRecord rows for (classSessionId, studentUserId).
Invoke check-in command passing auth, session Open, token Valid, enrollment, and duplicate guards; supply gps within effective radius.
Query check_in_attempts for outcome Success, gps_latitude, gps_longitude, gps_accuracy_meters, and gps_validation_result.
Query attendance_records for Present or Late status linked via source_attempt_id.
cases.expected: GPS guard step 6 passes for within-radius coordinates; CheckInAttempt records outcome Success with gps_validation_result indicating pass and distance within allowedRadiusMeters; AttendanceRecord is created with Present or Late per policy window.

cases.title: M04 GPS radius module rejects out-of-radius check-in and persists distance metadata without attendance write
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution, GPS validation, check-in, and attendance ledger modules.
Open session exists with gpsRequired=true, room at (10.762622, 106.660172), gpsRadiusMeters=100; student is actively enrolled with no prior success record.
Institution policy configured for strict rejection on out-of-radius (default BR-09 reject path).
steps: Capture beforeState: zero Present/Late AttendanceRecord rows for (classSessionId, studentUserId).
Invoke check-in command with valid qrToken passing steps 1–5; supply gps coordinates approximately 162 m from room anchor with accuracyMeters=24.5.
Query check_in_attempts row for outcome, distanceMeters, allowedRadiusMeters, and gps_validation_result.
Verify attendance_records row count remains zero within the same transaction boundary.
cases.expected: GPS guard persists one failed CheckInAttempt with outcome OutOfRadius and validation metadata (distanceMeters > allowedRadiusMeters); AttendanceRecord row count remains zero and beforeState is unchanged.

cases.title: SM-04 terminates at LowAccuracy when reported accuracy exceeds policy threshold
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates and accuracy threshold configured (e.g. maxAccuracyMeters=50).
Authenticated enrolled student has no existing successful attendance for the session.
Submitted GPS coordinates are within radius but accuracyMeters=120 exceeds threshold.
steps: Capture beforeState: session roster shows student in Pending with no success AttendanceRecord.
Submit check-in command that passes validation order steps 1–5 and distance check but fails accuracy threshold at GPS guard.
Capture afterState for CheckInAttempt outcome and AttendanceRecord rows.
cases.expected: SM-04 evaluation reaches LowAccuracy terminal state at GPS accuracy guard per BR-10; afterState shows persisted failed attempt with LowAccuracy and accuracy validation metadata; AttendanceRecord identical to beforeState.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 OutOfRadius with distance details when coordinates exceed radius
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates and gpsRadiusMeters=100 exists in test environment.
Authenticated student bearer token belongs to actively enrolled user with no prior success for the session.
Valid qrToken is available for the open session.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with Authorization Bearer token, valid qrToken, clientTimestamp, and gps payload with coordinates outside allowed radius.
Inspect HTTP status, response envelope (data/meta/error), error.code, and error.details.
Verify no success attendance payload is returned.
cases.expected: API returns 422 with standard envelope where data is null and error.code is OutOfRadius; error.details includes distanceMeters and allowedRadiusMeters per API design §4.4; no Present/Late attendance row is created.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 LowAccuracy when accuracyMeters exceeds configured threshold
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates and accuracy threshold configured.
Authenticated enrolled student has valid qrToken and no prior success record.
GPS coordinates are within radius but accuracyMeters exceeds policy threshold.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with valid token and gps payload: within-radius lat/lng with accuracyMeters above threshold.
Inspect HTTP 422 response envelope and error.code.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and confirm student remains Pending.
cases.expected: API returns 422 with error.code LowAccuracy per BR-10; response envelope follows standard shape; student attendance status remains Pending with failed attempt logged.

cases.title: POST /v1/auth/login then GET /v1/me before GPS-validated check-in submission
preconditions: Student test account exists with known credentials and active enrollment in gps-required session section.
Open session with valid qrToken and room coordinates configured.
No cached bearer token in test client.
steps: Call POST /v1/auth/login with student identifier and password.
Inspect HTTP 200 response for accessToken and Student role in data envelope.
Call GET /v1/me with Authorization Bearer token and assert studentUserId and Student role.
Call POST /v1/check-ins with same token, valid qrToken, and within-radius gps payload.
Verify HTTP 200 with outcome Success and attendanceStatus Present or Late.
cases.expected: Auth gate per FR-15 and FR-36 succeeds before FR-35 GPS validation: login returns Student token; GET /v1/me confirms actor identity; within-radius check-in passes GPS guard and records success.

cases.title: GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance reflects OutOfRadius rejected attempt in live roster payload
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates configured.
Enrolled student has submitted failed OutOfRadius check-in attempt with distance metadata logged.
Lecturer bearer token is available for assigned section.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with out-of-radius gps payload and receives 422 OutOfRadius.
Lecturer calls GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with Authorization Bearer token.
Inspect HTTP 200 response envelope: counts.rejectedAttempts, student row attendanceStatus, and latestAttemptOutcome.
cases.expected: Live roster payload per FR-19 shows student as Pending with latestAttemptOutcome OutOfRadius; counts.rejectedAttempts is incremented; response envelope includes standard data/meta shape with no cross-scope leakage.

cases.title: FLOW-03 happy path: student within room radius completes GPS-validated check-in as Present
preconditions: Lecturer has opened gps-required session (AC-01) with room coordinates and gpsRadiusMeters=100.
Student completes login gate and is actively enrolled with no prior success record.
Student device supplies GPS coordinates within configured radius and acceptable accuracy during present window.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/auth/login and receives Student accessToken.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and within-radius gps payload.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the student row.
Verify CheckInAttempt outcome Success with gps_validation_result indicating pass.
cases.expected: FR-35 within-radius validation passes; check-in returns 200 with outcome Success and attendanceStatus Present; roster shows student checked in via QR with gps_validation_result logged; remote check-in risk is reduced without claiming anti-spoofing guarantees.

cases.title: FLOW-03 alternate branch: out-of-radius rejection with auditable attempt and lecturer manual fallback
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room coordinates configured and rotating QR.
Student is authenticated and enrolled; GPS coordinates are outside configured radius.
Lecturer manual edit window is active per effective policy.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and out-of-radius gps payload.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for rejectedAttempts count and student row.
Lecturer applies PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with Manual Present and documented reason.
Verify audit log entry for manual correction.
cases.expected: FR-35 rejects out-of-radius self check-in with 422 OutOfRadius; failed attempt is auditable per AC-18 with distance metadata; lecturer manual fallback succeeds per BR-14 without bypassing audit requirements.

cases.title: Boundary distinguishes within-radius success from just-beyond-radius OutOfRadius rejection at default 100 m
preconditions: Open gps-required session with room at known anchor and gpsRadiusMeters=100.
Two authenticated enrolled students (or resettable attempt state) with no successful attendance.
Test harness supplies deterministic GPS coordinates at 99 m (pass) and 101 m (fail) from room anchor with acceptable accuracy.
steps: Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student A with gps coordinates approximately 99 m from room anchor; record status and outcome.
Submit POST /v1/check-ins for student B with gps coordinates approximately 101 m from room anchor; record status and error.code.
Verify CheckInAttempt metadata and AttendanceRecord outcomes for both submissions.
cases.expected: Within-radius submission (99 m) proceeds past GPS distance guard to Present/Late assignment; just-beyond-radius submission (101 m) returns 422 with error.code OutOfRadius and logs distanceMeters/allowedRadiusMeters; boundary enforces effective gpsRadiusMeters default per FR-35.

cases.title: POST /v1/check-ins returns 422 GpsDisabled when GPS permission is denied under gps-required policy
preconditions: Open gps-required session with effective policy gpsRequired=true.
Authenticated enrolled student has valid qrToken and no prior success record.
Check-in request includes gps payload with permissionDenied=true or omits coordinates after policy requires GPS.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and gps payload indicating permission denied or unavailable coordinates.
Inspect HTTP 422 response and error.code GpsDisabled or GpsRequired.
Verify no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created.
cases.expected: FR-35 and BR-08 reject self check-in when GPS is required but coordinates are unavailable due to permission denial; error.code is GpsDisabled; attempt is logged with structured reason; lecturer manual fallback remains available.

cases.title: Institution flag policy accepts out-of-radius check-in with Suspicious outcome per BR-09 alternate path
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for policy resolution and check-in modules.
Open gps-required session with room coordinates; institution policy sets outOfRadiusAction=flag rather than strict reject.
Authenticated enrolled student has no prior success record; GPS coordinates are outside configured radius.
steps: Submit check-in command with valid qrToken and out-of-radius GPS payload under flag policy configuration.
Query CheckInAttempt for outcome Suspicious and validation metadata (distanceMeters, allowedRadiusMeters).
Query AttendanceRecord and session roster for the student row.
cases.expected: Per BR-09 exception path and FR-35 flag behavior, check-in is accepted with Suspicious outcome rather than hard OutOfRadius rejection; CheckInAttempt logs distance and validation result for lecturer review.

cases.title: Non-Student roles denied POST /v1/check-ins with GPS payload before radius evaluation
preconditions: Open gps-required session with valid QR token and configured room coordinates exists.
Lecturer and ITAdmin identities are available with valid bearer tokens per permission matrix.
steps: Call POST /v1/check-ins as Lecturer with valid qrToken and within-radius gps payload.
Call POST /v1/check-ins as ITAdmin with the same token context.
Call POST /v1/check-ins as enrolled Student (control) with out-of-radius gps coordinates.
Verify denial responses contain no partial attendance mutation from privileged roles.
cases.expected: Lecturer and ITAdmin receive 403 Forbidden before GPS radius evaluation; Student control reaches business validation and receives 422 OutOfRadius; no AttendanceRecord is created by denied roles.

cases.title: Student mobile-web journey surfaces out-of-radius failure with localized recovery guidance
preconditions: Student is logged in on mobile-web browser (PG-02 check-in page).
Target session has gpsRequired=true, room coordinates configured, and is Open with valid QR token.
Browser geolocation is granted but test profile supplies coordinates outside configured radius.
steps: Navigate to check-in URL with valid token query parameter for the gps-required session.
Grant browser location permission when prompted per FLOW-03.
Submit check-in from the student check-in form with out-of-radius coordinates.
Observe CheckInResultScreen failure-out-of-radius alert styling, recovery steps, and lecturer fallback guidance.
cases.expected: UI renders failure-out-of-radius alert with localized message (e.g. 'Ngoài phạm vi lớp'); recovery copy prompts student to move closer or báo giảng viên for manual fallback; no success status is shown and student remains Pending on roster.

cases.title: Lecturer live roster shows OutOfRadius rejected attempt with review metadata and manual correction path
preconditions: Student has failed OutOfRadius check-in attempt on an Open gps-required session with distance metadata logged.
Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster view) for the assigned section.
Manual edit window is active per effective policy.
steps: Lecturer navigates to live session roster for the gps-required session.
Locate the student row showing Pending status with latestAttemptOutcome OutOfRadius in rejected summary.
Verify distance or out-of-radius indicator is visible for lecturer review.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog and submit Manual Present correction with required reason after in-person verification.
cases.expected: Roster displays student as Pending with OutOfRadius rejection visible in attempt summary including review metadata per FR-19; ManualCorrectionDialog accepts correction; post-save row updates to Manual Present confirming lecturer fallback path remains operable.
